course_description.overview: Routes wind through protected Sierra de Vallejo National Park with rolling terrain, short steep climbs, and panoramic Pacific views. Two distances: Gran Fondo (90km) for most riders; Forte (130km) more demanding.[1]

key_segments.name: Sierra de Vallejo National Park
key_segments.description: Protected area with rolling terrain and short steep climbs offering panoramic ocean views.

key_segments.name: Forte Climb Section
key_segments.description: Elite-inspired demanding segments in the longer 130km route.

course_description.difficulty_narrative: Rewarding challenge with rolling roads and punchy climbs suitable for intermediate to advanced road cyclists; fully supported.[1]

logistics.getting_there: 20 minutes from Puerto Vallarta International Airport (PVR); easy access for international travelers.[1]
logistics.accommodation: Official partner Marival Resorts offers 35% discount with code SPIN2WIN at Marival Emotions Resort & Suites (host hotel) or Marival Distinct Luxury Residences.[1]
logistics.registration_details: Open now via www.rbcgranfondo.com/event/nayarit or RaceRoster; early registration US$199 (Oct 31-Feb 28), then US$225; includes limited-edition jersey; deposit non-refundable.[1][3]
logistics.bike_logistics: notable event support; bike shipping to Puerto Vallarta recommended.[1]
logistics.local_considerations: Beachfront festival at Playa FIBBA with live music, food trucks, awards; extend stay for beaches, snorkeling, whale watching, mezcal tastings.[1]

final_verdict.one_liner: Premium beachside gran fondo blending epic coastal rides with Mexican festival vibes.
final_verdict.who_is_it_for: Road cyclists seeking a supported destination event with stunning scenery, party atmosphere, and easy travel from North America.
final_verdict.is_it_worth_it: Yes, for its unique sea-to-sun experience, pro organization, and value as a cycling vacation.
pro_tips: Book early for jersey and hotel discounts.
Fly into PVR and rent/extend for eco-tours.
Train for punchy climbs in rolling terrain.
Join teams for social ride and festival fun.
